name: @blaze-systems/mn-vault
description: A local signing vault that houses a Midnight seed so an AI assistant can never read it. Two paths: minimal one-shot signer (default) and an opt-in signing daemon.

scripts.test: node tests/guard.test.mjs && node tests/signing.test.mjs && node tests/lifecycle.test.mjs && node tests/decode.test.mjs && node tests/runtime.test.mjs && node tests/edition.test.mjs && node tests/approval.test.mjs && node tests/display.test.mjs

pin-rationale: ledger-v8 pinned to 8.0.3 — the version verified on disk (signingKeyFromBip340/signData/signatureVerifyingKey present). Do NOT float to 8.1.x without re-verifying the signing surface. The seed-signer must never get a surprise SDK bump. wallet-sdk-facade 3.0.0 is the v8 set per the deploy breadcrumbs; confirm on tsc.
